direction_audit.mandatory_constraints: DO NOT modify should_fold_postflop(), fold thresholds, fold gates, equity estimation methods, or any river fold decision logic. The postflop fold subsystem has been reworked 5 consecutive generations (v44-v48) with diminishing returns — v48 drew 5-5 against v47 and still loses to v30. The fold path is now consolidated into tier-based equity; further tuning is exhausted. Instead, evolve ONE of: (1) preflop 3-bet/4-bet bluff frequency and sizing against different opponent types, (2) flop c-bet and turn barrel sizing strategy (currently no opponent-adaptive sizing exists), or (3) river value-bet thin-value extraction for medium-strength hands that currently check behind.
direction_audit.suggested_direction: Add opponent-adaptive flop/turn barrel sizing: track opponent fold-to-cbet and fold-to-turn-barrel tendencies, then size bets to exploit — small bets (25-33% pot) vs sticky callers, large bets (75-100% pot) vs folders. The bot currently uses fixed sizing ratios (RAISE_RATIO_FLOP/TURN) with no opponent awareness on offensive streets. This is the offensive complement to the defensive fold work done in v44-v48.
